response.overview: Syifa is a girl with a disability since birth and now works as a housemaid in Datin Laili's home. Datin Laili often mistreats Syifa. Datin Laili's son, Mukriz, sympathizes with Syifa's plight and often helps her. Datin Laili dislikes Syifa and prevents her son Mukriz from being with Syifa because of her disability. Because their marriage does not receive approval, Mukriz is determined to marry Syifa abroad. The hatred intensifies when Mukriz, Datin Laili's son, marries Syifa. Datin Laili is shocked to learn that Mukriz has married Syifa. However, something unexpected happens when the truth is revealed—Syifa turns out to be Datin Laili's biological daughter. Mukriz and Syifa are forced to separate because they are biological siblings.
response.title: Ciptaan Terindah
